dhikr.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلَالِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
dhikr.transliteration: Allahumma akfini bi-halalika 'an haramika, wa aghnini bi-fadlika 'amman siwaka
dhikr.en: O Allah, suffice me with what You have made lawful instead of what You have made unlawful, and make me independent of all others besides You.

dhikr.ar: لَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ
dhikr.transliteration: La hawla wa la quwwata illa billah
dhikr.en: There is no power or strength except with Allah.

dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ
dua.transliteration: Allahumma anta rabbi la ilaha illa anta khalaqtani wa ana 'abduka
dua.en: O Allah, You are my Lord. There is no deity except You. You created me and I am Your servant.

dhikr.ar: اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَدَنِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي سَمْعِي، اللَّهُمَّ عَافِنِي فِي بَصَرِي
dhikr.transliteration: Allahumma 'afini fi badani, Allahumma 'afini fi sam'i, Allahumma 'afini fi basari
dhikr.en: O Allah, grant me health in my body. O Allah, grant me health in my hearing. O Allah, grant me health in my sight.
Allah is sufficient for me and He is the best disposer of affairs.

dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ النَّاسِ أَذْهِبِ الْبَأْسَ اشْفِ أَنْتَ الشَّافِي لَا شِفَاءَ إِلَّا شِفَاؤُكَ شِفَاءً لَا يُغَادِرُ سَقَمًا
dua.transliteration: Allahumma rabba an-nasi adhhib al-ba'sa ishfi anta ash-shafi la shifa'a illa shifa'uka shifa'an la yughadiru saqaman
dua.en: O Allah, Lord of the people, remove the difficulty and bring about healing. You are the Healer. There is no healing except Your healing, a healing that leaves no illness.

dhikr.ar: رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَاجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّاتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَاجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
dhikr.transliteration: Rabbana hab lana min azwajina wa dhurriyatina qurrata a'yunin wa-j'alna li-al-muttaqina imaman
dhikr.en: Our Lord, grant us from our spouses and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous.
Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him.

dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهَا وَخَيْرَ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ، وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهَا وَشَرِّ مَا جَبَلْتَهَا عَلَيْهِ
dua.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka khayraha wa khayra ma jabaltaha 'alayhi, wa a'udhu bika min sharriha wa sharri ma jabaltaha 'alayhi
dua.en: O Allah, I ask You for the good in her and the good that You have created her to be inclined towards, and I seek refuge in You from the evil in her and the evil that You have created her to be inclined towards.

dhikr.en: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

dhikr.ar: لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ
dhikr.transliteration: La ilaha illa anta subhanaka inni kuntu min adh-dhalimin
dhikr.en: There is no deity except You. Glory be to You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers.

dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ لَا سَهْلَ إِلَّا مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلًا، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلًا
dua.transliteration: Allahumma la sahla illa ma ja'altahu sahla, wa anta taj'alu al-hazna idha shi'ta sahla
dua.en: O Allah, there is nothing easy except what You make easy, and You make the difficult easy if You wish.

dhikr.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحُزْنِ، وَالْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَالْبُخْلِ وَالْجُبْنِ
dhikr.transliteration: Allahumma inni a'udhu bika min al-hammi wa al-huzni, wa al-'ajzi wa al-kasali, wa al-bukhli wa al-jubni
dhikr.en: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from worry and grief, from incapacity and laziness, from miserliness and cowardice.
Allah is sufficient for us and He is the best disposer of affairs.

dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ اشرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي، وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي، وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِنْ لِسَانِي يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي
dua.transliteration: Allahumma ishrah li sadri, wa yassir li amri, wa ahlul 'uqdatan min lisani yafqahu qawli
dua.en: O Allah, expand my chest for me, make my task easy for me, and remove the impediment from my speech so they may understand what I say.

dhikr.ar: سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ سُبْحَانَ اللَّهِ الْعَظِيمِ
dhikr.en: Glory be to Allah and praise be to Him. Glory be to Allah, the Most Great.

dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ عَفُوٌّ تُحِبُّ الْعَفْوَ فَاعْفُ عَنِّي
dua.en: O Allah, You are Forgiving and love forgiveness, so forgive me.

dhikr.en: O Allah, guide me and make me firm.

dhikr.ar: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً
dhikr.transliteration: Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana ba'da idh hadaytana wa hab lana min ladunka rahmatan
dhikr.en: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us and grant us mercy from Yourself.

dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْهُدَى وَالتُّقَى وَالْعَفَافَ وَالْغِنَى
dua.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka al-huda wa at-tuqa wa al-'afafa wa al-ghina
dua.en: O Allah, I ask You for guidance, piety, chastity, and self-sufficiency.

dhikr.ar: اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيَّ وَمِنْ خَلْفِي وَعَنْ يَمِينِي وَعَنْ شِمَالِي وَمِنْ فَوْقِي
dhikr.transliteration: Allahumma ahfazni min bayni yadayya wa min khalfi wa 'an yamini wa 'an shimali wa min fawqi
dhikr.en: O Allah, protect me from before me and from behind me, from my right and from my left, and from above me.

dhikr.ar: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيْءٌ فِي الْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِي السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
dhikr.transliteration: Bismillahi alladhi la yadurru ma'a ismihi shay'un fi al-ardi wa la fi as-sama'i wa huwa as-sami'u al-'alim
dhikr.en: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing can harm on earth or in heaven, and He is the All-Hearing, All-Knowing.

dua.ar: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي وَنَصِيرِي بِكَ أَحُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ وَبِكَ أُقَاتِلُ
dua.transliteration: Allahumma anta 'adudi wa nasiri bika ahulu wa bika asulu wa bika uqatilu
dua.en: O Allah, You are my support and my helper. By You I move, by You I attack, and by You I fight.
